# Headline

V2 comfortably met the win threshold; the lift is clearly above the
pre-registered bound and decisively crosses zero.

The retention arm obviously outperformed control on the headline read,
and we are definitely keeping the new flow.

The cohort definitively shows undoubtedly higher activation on day 7.

We can certainly attribute this to the new copy. The result comfortably
holds across both supplier mixes.

Internally the read clearly favours the treatment, and the outcome is
decisively net-positive even after the conservative penalty.

The post-hoc segment cut comfortably re-confirms the headline.
